body:
Hi Amara,

Following up on our conversation last week — I wanted to share that [CarbonLedger](company/carbonledger) just closed out our first enterprise pilot with a Tier 1 utility, and the early data on carbon credit verification throughput is looking really strong. We're planning to kick off our Series A process in Q4, and given your focus at [Halfway Capital](firm/halfway-capital) on climate infrastructure, I think the timing could line up well for us to go deeper. Would you be open to a 30-minute call in the next few weeks to walk through the updated metrics and roadmap? I'd love to get your perspective on how you're thinking about the market right now, especially with all the policy movement happening around voluntary carbon markets.

Best,
Chloe
